summary: Shifted the opening outward to Ferrymouth's citywide uptake of the name before returning to Junie's kitchen, preserving the same morning fallout while giving chapter 14 a different entry scaffold from chapter 15's direct kitchen re-entry. The chapter's final handoff into Silas carrying his work home already aligned cleanly with the next chapter and was left intact.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to anchor first in Ferrymouth's pale-gold spread rather than an immediate kitchen start.
Adjusted the second paragraph to bridge from the exterior city image back into Junie's kitchen without changing scene beats.
